q: A SysOps administrator needs to monitor EC2 instance CPU utilization and trigger an SNS notification when it exceeds 80% for 5 consecutive minutes. Which service should be configured?
explain: CloudWatch Alarms monitor metric thresholds and can trigger SNS notifications.

q: CloudWatch Logs Insights needs to be used to analyze application errors. What should be configured first?
options: Enable log group for the application
explain: CloudWatch Logs Insights requires that logs first be collected in a CloudWatch log group.

q: A SysOps administrator needs to detect unauthorized API calls and create alarms. Which combination of services is required?
explain: CloudTrail logs API calls; EventBridge can trigger on those events to create alarms.

q: A critical application requires monitoring of application-level metrics not available from CloudWatch. What should be used?
explain: Custom metrics allow applications to publish their own metrics to CloudWatch for monitoring.

q: A SysOps administrator needs to create a unified view of operational health across multiple AWS services. Which service aggregates this information?
explain: Systems Manager OpsCenter aggregates operational information from multiple AWS services.

q: A SysOps administrator needs to monitor Lambda function performance and errors. Which CloudWatch feature is used?
explain: Lambda automatically logs to CloudWatch Logs, where function performance and errors can be monitored.

q: A SysOps administrator needs to detect anomalous cost patterns. Which CloudWatch feature enables this?
explain: CloudWatch Anomaly Detector uses machine learning to detect anomalous metric values.

q: A SysOps administrator needs to set up alarm escalation to multiple teams. Which SNS feature enables this?
explain: Multiple SNS topic subscriptions enable routing of alarm notifications to different teams.

q: A SysOps administrator needs to monitor EBS volume performance. Which CloudWatch metric is important?
explain: EBS performance requires monitoring latency, throughput, and queue depth metrics.

q: A SysOps administrator needs to track all IAM actions for compliance. Which service logs these activities?
explain: CloudTrail logs all API calls including IAM actions for audit and compliance purposes.

q: A SysOps administrator is optimizing AWS infrastructure. What should be considered?
explain: AWS solutions should balance cost, performance, and security requirements.
